scope: offline current-state overlay on the complete 2026-07-12 public-ecosystem ledger

refresh_policy.normal_ci: offline: validate this overlay and its baseline hash without contacting remotes
refresh_policy.network_refresh: manually verify advertised refs and repository contents, then update this dated overlay and dependent prose
refresh_policy.expiry: re-review an edge when its producer revision, consumer revision, schema, wire, model, or adapter revision changes

last_network_refresh.method: official GitHub refs plus exact-revision repository surfaces; archived baseline left immutable
last_network_refresh.conclusion: only pid-rs and NCP remain direct Prisoma edges; no reviewed sibling reached E2 with Prisoma or E4 scientific conformance

overrides.relationship: direct pinned submodule and local path dependency
overrides.current_boundary: version 1.0 remains deliberately pinned despite a newer upstream HEAD; its fixtures do not establish high-dimensional VLA application validity or independent corroboration

overrides.relationship: optional immutable dependency of the workspace-excluded read-only observer
overrides.current_boundary: no conforming public live producer, secure deployment receipt, or E4 scientific conformance report

overrides.relationship: candidate comparator sharing pid-rs and NCP; observation and producer-lifecycle sidecar contracts exist upstream, but no direct Prisoma adapter
overrides.current_boundary: Crebain now has an optional evidence-sender component, but there is still no direct Prisoma adapter, deployed receiver-verified Crebain-to-Galadriel path, live monitor publisher/cross-route assembler, or receiver-verified end-to-end mTLS deployment; shared PID code remains one correlated implementation family

overrides.relationship: candidate producer with an off-by-default, two-gate native Galadriel evidence sender plus inactive plant-contract library surfaces and a profile-neutral frame-convention corpus
overrides.current_boundary: the sender requires both the off-by-default ncp build feature and an exact runtime opt-in, while the standard release omits ncp and no release candidate or exact-head release evidence is sealed; a local put is not receiver receipt, decoding, correlation, or deployed TLS/ACL evidence, the frame corpus is not called by admission and carries no frame-instance or origin/datum/body-point proof, NCP action/control commands remain unregistered, and no direct Prisoma adapter, managed product route, or live Crebain-to-Engram loop exists

overrides.relationship: candidate difficult external adapter and transport test
overrides.current_boundary: the producer explicitly has no drop-in Prisoma adapter and documents schema, tensor, clock, frame, and statistical gaps
the public repository is README-only and says implementation will be open-sourced after publication; no executable public Engram/NCP producer exists

overrides.relationship: candidate security and authority comparator with no direct Prisoma edge
overrides.current_boundary: upstream now has substantial internal P0/durability work, an opt-in exact NCP adapter, a narrow receiver-observed synthetic mTLS/ACL campaign, an off-by-default exact-route strict-publisher binding with a broader Called-lifecycle fault matrix, and fail-closed validation of a caller-declared live startup profile, but the declaration is cooperative, process-local, bypassable through lower-level construction, and not durably bound; positive composition and result/fault evidence use test-only seams and no live Zenoh session executes the concrete method; there is no runnable service, credential-custody proof, Crebain application, immutable release, E4 report, or direct Prisoma route, and any use must remain offline/advisory unless the Agent Bridge-only control-plane decision is revised

overrides.relationship: candidate read-only visualization consumer with no direct Prisoma edge
overrides.current_boundary: upstream has a strict versioned VizSpec, generated manifest, provenance/resource gates, and checked render paths, but remains pre-1.0, lacks headless export, and does not supersede Prisoma's Rerun-first decision or establish a Prisoma contract

overrides.relationship: candidate optional reconstruction and scene-variation producer with no direct Prisoma edge
overrides.current_boundary: upstream has a source release candidate, versioned inspection contract, reviewed reconstruction bridges, and render tests, but no calibrated reconstruction-to-diagnostic uncertainty claim, Prisoma adapter, or E4 report; optional tool/model licenses vary
